fandoms.name: Arcane
fandoms.visual_language: jewel tones, heavy film grain, high contrast between Piltover (warm gold) and Zaun (green/teal). Chromatic aberration on emotional peaks.
fandoms.notes: Most emotional beats are in the second half of season 1. Season 2 leans harder into blue/red contrast.

fandoms.name: Lord of the Rings
fandoms.visual_language: desaturated greens and browns with warm highlights on heroism. Sweeping wide shots on emotional peaks.

iconic_scenes.scene: I would have gone with you to the end
